inputs.label: Base Radius
inputs.businessContext: Radius of the circular base of the cone.

businessContext_i18n.en: Radius of the circular base of the cone.
businessContext_i18n.de: Radius der kreisförmigen Basis des Kegels.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rayon de la base circulaire du cône.
businessContext_i18n.es: Radio de la base circular del cono.

inputs.label: Height
inputs.businessContext: Perpendicular height from base to apex.

businessContext_i18n.en: Perpendicular height from base to apex.
businessContext_i18n.de: Senkrechte Höhe von der Basis zur Spitze.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur perpendiculaire de la base au sommet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura perpendicular desde la base hasta el vértice.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الارتفاع العمودي من القاعدة إلى القمة.

inputs.label: Slant Height (optional, 0 to auto-calc)
inputs.businessContext: Slant height along lateral surface; if 0, it will be computed as sqrt(radius^2 + height^2).

label_i18n.tr: Eğik Yükseklik (isteğe bağlı, otomatik hesaplama için 0)

businessContext_i18n.en: Slant height along lateral surface; if 0, it will be computed as sqrt(radius^2 + height^2).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yanal yüzey boyunca eğik yükseklik; 0 ise sqrt(yarıçap^2 + yükseklik^2) olarak hesaplanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mantellinie entlang der Seitenfläche; bei 0 wird sie als sqrt(Radius^2 + Höhe^2) berechnet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur inclinée le long de la surface latérale ; si 0, calculée comme sqrt(rayon^2 + hauteur^2).
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura inclinada a lo largo de la superficie lateral; si es 0, se calculará como sqrt(radio^2 + altura^2).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الارتفاع الجانبي على طول السطح الجانبي؛ إذا كان 0، سيتم حسابه كجذر(نصف القطر^2 + الارتفاع^2).

inputs.label: Base Diameter (alternative to radius)
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of base; if >0, radius is overridden as diameter/2.

label_i18n.es: Diámetro de la base (alternativa al radio)

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of base; if >0, radius is overridden as diameter/2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taban çapı; >0 ise yarıçap, çap/2 olarak geçersiz kılınır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchmesser der Basis; falls >0, wird der Radius als Durchmesser/2 überschrieben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre de la base ; si >0, le rayon est remplacé par diamètre/2.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro de la base; si >0, el radio se anula como diámetro/2.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قطر القاعدة؛ إذا كان >0، يتم تجاوز نصف القطر كقطر/2.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding outputs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding outputs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktıları yuvarlamak için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden der Ausgaben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour l'arrondi des résultats.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear los resultados.

inputs.label: Include Surface Area (1=yes, 0=no)
inputs.businessContext: If 1, outputs also include lateral surface area and total surface area.

businessContext_i18n.en: If 1, outputs also include lateral surface area and total surface area.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 ise, çıktılar yanal yüzey alanı ve toplam yüzey alanını da içerir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bei 1 werden auch Mantelfläche und Gesamtoberfläche ausgegeben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si 1, les résultats incluent également la surface latérale et la surface totale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es 1, los resultados también incluyen el área de la superficie lateral y el área de la superficie total.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا كان 1، تشمل المخرجات أيضًا مساحة السطح الجانبية والمساحة الكلية.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
